title: Add health check detail endpoint
description: Create GET /api/health/detail route returning { status, uptime, version, timestamp }. Read version from package.json. Include integration test following existing health route patterns.
existing_patterns: src/app/api/health/route.ts - simple GET handler returning JSON with status, uptime, timestamp
src/app/api/health/route.test.ts - vitest test using fake timers, NextRequest, and expects on response status/headers/body
